system.description: Load your soul into your Gun. Enter the space where the Eliminated are kept and roll [quality].

outcomes.success: you may seek someone or something Eliminated and communicate with them. In your path are 5 other things you have Eliminated, each with a grievance. You must trade them a 3, take 1 Harm, or make a promise related to their grievance to continue past them. These promises are powerful, and binding: if you do not fulfill a promise or miss an opportunity to do so, you die as if targeted by the Overwhelm Chaos Effect.
outcomes.failure: one of the targets you’ve Eliminated returns to your body and takes it for themselves. You die, and now this other self with another Gun is at large.
outcomes.triscendence: you may take the Eliminated target you seek back from this space with you into Reality. They will always carry a physical mark of their Elimination. It doesn’t always look like a bullet wound.

improvement.question: Only you can answer this question. Be prepared for serious consequences if you do. Do you regret it?
